meta.title: Alexandra Porhansl — Full-Stack Developer · Vue / Nuxt · Mulhouse
meta.description: Full-stack developer with a strong front-end leaning (Vue, Nuxt, TypeScript, Symfony), 7 years of experience. Based in Mulhouse, France — within reach of Basel, Freiburg and Zurich. Open to freelance work or permanent roles.

hero.eyebrow: Mulhouse · Basel 35 min · Freiburg 50 min · Zurich 1 h 50
hero.stack: front-end at heart · vue · nuxt — symfony · nest — 7 years

status.fl: Available — web & mobile contract work · remote or hybrid
status.cdi: Open to permanent roles · Mulhouse & cross-border (Basel · Freiburg · Zurich)

value.title: What I bring
value.intro: Seven years of building web products across industries taught me one thing: code is only half the job. The other half is understanding what people actually need — then shipping it.

s1.d: I listen to the client — or the team when the need is internal — ask the right questions, and turn it all into a clear, prioritised, actionable spec.

s2.d: I build with Claude Code every day — a skill built on my own time. Agent set-up, systematic review, tests: I stay in charge, the tool multiplies the pace. This very site is direct proof.

s3.d: Full project cycle: I turn a need into a shipped product — specs, development, QA, deployment, follow-up.

bullets.t: moved a CSHTML / jQuery codebase to Vue.js.
major releases built with Ionic and Angular, shipped to Google Play & the App Store.
built and deployed a complete website with Nuxt.js.
contributed to the PrestaShop 1.6 to 8.2 upgrade.
tracked down complex bugs, improved platform stability and performance.
led the Vue.js / TypeScript front end.
Swift development for a large part of the mission, through to the app's public release.
designed SaaS interfaces for a vehicle fleet management product.
worked with Docker and Git-based CI/CD.
custom solutions built with Symfony 3/4/5 and PHP.
built and maintained a portfolio of WordPress sites.
administered Windows Server and Linux machines.

mob.title: Mobility
mob.text: Based in Mulhouse with a driving licence and my own car, the tri-border area is within easy reach — Basel, Freiburg, Zurich, Strasbourg. Remote, hybrid or on-site.
mob.mapAria: Travel-time map from Mulhouse: Colmar 30 min, Basel 35 min, Belfort 40 min, Freiburg 50 min, Montbéliard 50 min, Strasbourg 55 min, Zurich 1 h 50

en.name: English
en.note: good comprehension — actively improving, daily practice

cta.fl: Let's talk about your project — I reply within 24 hours.
cta.cdi: Let's talk — CV available in FR / EN / DE.

A single strictly functional cookie is used: “aud”, which remembers the chosen display mode (freelance or permanent). It exists purely for browsing comfort and is never shared with third parties.
Any question about your data: a.porhansl{'@'}icloud.com.
